Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Aether Technician]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — Tanner Hall has a moderate Aether Technician’s affinity for starships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — Aether Technicians are wizards with unique spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — Aether Technicians are professionals who may not be known for single combat abilities.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — Mell is an Aether Technician with powerful gifts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 13''' — Aether Technicians are hired by the Advocates at competitive rates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — Mell is considered a top Aether Technician in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — Mell was cloned from the DNA of four human Aether Technicians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — An Aether Technician's gift can be used to influence the features of Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Aether Technicians wear fully contained, masked suits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — An Aether Technician is a specialized role or profession.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — An Aether Technician is a role with an affinity for repairs.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Aether Technicians could potentially get almost anything out of the core components.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 38''' — Aether Technicians are considered reputable.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
